calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Interpleder. Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Jennifer Seelenbacher, CSR #11878 (877)451-1580.

James Nevin, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff Brayton Purcell LLP.Defendant Sandra Tsagares-Allen present in pro per, placed under oath and examined. No other appearances.

The Court hears testimony and arguments by the parties.
After hearing the court issues a Judgement on Interpleader in favor of Sandra Tsagares-Allen at 100% of the balance from the interplead funds after costs and fees by Brayton Burcell LLP. Net proceeeds after costs & fees from future settlement recovered in the Gene Allen Asbestos Related Claims shall be paid according to the terms stated in the interplead funds above without need for further leave of the Court.
Plaintiff is awarded costs and fees in the total amount of $2,153.70.
See Scanned doc. for details of the Judgment.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-18-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Oct-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
